2026-05-26PWGSCFinancial Administration ActAppointment of a director of the board of directors of Defence Construction (1951) LimitedApproval of the appointment by the Minister of Public Works and Government Services of Joanne Michelle Weir of Winnipeg, Manitoba, to be a director of the board of directors of Defence Construction (1951) Limited, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the board of directors of Defence Construction (1951) Limited
precis: Approval of the appointment by the Minister of Public Works and Government Services of Joanne Michelle Weir of Winnipeg, Manitoba, to be a director of the board of directors of Defence Construction (1951) Limited, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years.
